description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical Damage, knocking them down for [1sec -> 1.8 sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest Attack, dealing Physical Damage, knocking them down for [1sec -> 1.8 sec], and increasing their Physical Damage taken by [20% -> 30%] for 4 sec.

Removes your [harmful -> harmful] effects and [grants -> puts] all allies [into -> into] [Reading the Wind] state for [7sec -> 10 sec], increasing Attack and Physical [Evasion -> Evasion Chance] by [300 -> 350]. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical Damage is increased by [2% -> 3%] for [7sec -> 10 sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical Damage and stunning them for 1.8 sec. This skill gains an additional [800 -> 500] Physical Defense Penetration.

Increases [ (added) Critical Hit Chance by 150, and] Normal Attacks ignore the target’s damage reduction effects. On Normal Attack, has a [20% -> 15%] chance to deal additional Physical Damage, stunning the target for [0.5sec -> 0.6 sec] and [increasing Physical DMG taken by 15% -> reducing their Physical Defense by 25%] for 5 sec.

IV.unified: Stuns [damaged -> hit] enemies for [1 sec -> 3 sec].

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by [250 -> 400].
Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by [20% for 7 sec -> 40% for 6 sec].

light.unified: [ (added) Normal Attack damage is increased by 25%, and] the cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec.

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [10 sec -> 2 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by [5% -> 10%], and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target's Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by [35 -> 30] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: On hit, increases the target's Physical Damage taken by {0}% and reduces Status Ailment Resistance by [{1} -> {1}] for [ (removed) {1} -> 10] sec. If the target is a boss, damage dealt to the boss is increased by [{4}% -> {2}%], and this boss damage increase effect stacks up to 10 times.
